records.ety: [F. cidre, OF. sidre, fr. L. sicera a kind of strong drink, Gr. <?/; of Oriental origin; cf. Heb. shākar to be intoxicated, shēkār strong drink.]

defs: The expressed juice of apples. It is used as a beverage, for making vinegar, and for other purposes.
notes: ☞ Cider was formerly used to signify the juice of other fruits, and other kinds of strong liquor, but was not applied to wine.
